assessment.note: He signaled the work got done but was carrying more hidden weight than he let on, suggesting mild friction and some concealment rather than clean momentum.

new_queue.label: Heavier than said
new_queue.name: When you say 'heavier' — what was making it heavy?
new_queue.description: Drills into the specific source of the load Lin just named so the friction is concrete.

new_queue.label: Opening pace check
new_queue.name: How's the last two weeks actually felt — energy-wise?
new_queue.description: Opener that invites a real answer rather than 'fine'. Reads wellbeing directly.

new_queue.label: Priority clarity
new_queue.name: What are you actually focused on this week, and why those things?
new_queue.description: Surfaces whether priorities are crisp or vague; whether they match what you thought.

new_queue.label: Decision load
new_queue.name: Where are you still the bottleneck?
new_queue.description: Finds spots where Lin may be carrying decisions that could move faster with different ownership.

new_queue.label: Support needed
new_queue.name: What would be most useful from me over the next two weeks?
new_queue.description: Opens the door for air cover, unblocking, or decision support in a concrete way.

new_queue.label: Next two weeks
new_queue.name: What would make the next two weeks lighter for you?
new_queue.description: Closes by steering toward practical changes that reduce load without introducing new topics.
